title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at DSV India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at DSV India
jsonLd.description:
DSV India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Delhi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DSV India:
DSV India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DSV India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
